name: Teacher OS
gate_blockers: FERPA compliance review required before storing student data
5 teacher interviews needed to validate feature priority
Data processing agreement template needed for school contracts
Audio/AI strategy for student data anonymization
assertions: Teachers spend 40-50% of time on non-student work
Individualized instruction is mandated but practically impossible at 30:1
anti_drift_notes: Teacher is always the decision-maker — AI drafts, teacher approves
Never store student real names in AI prompts — use teacher-assigned display names
IEP support is advisory only — no clinical positioning
Do not automate parent communications — require teacher approval
decision_debt: FERPA data processing agreement — need legal template
Student data anonymization strategy — pseudonymization vs. synthetic IDs
School vs. individual pricing model — validate with teachers first
Audio analysis for practice sessions — in-house vs. third-party API
change_notes: 2026-04-04: Added Teacher Self-Care, New Teacher Survival Layer, Peer Community, Homeschool Version, Laws of Success / Integrity Score / Ethical Persuasion
2026-04-05: Foundation built — 5 DB tables, 3 services, 25-endpoint route file, wired at /api/v1/teacher
